questions.scenario: Queue messages are building up, but the receipt function shows no recent successful runs. What should the team inspect first?

options.text: Whether the function is enabled, its trigger configuration, app settings, storage access, and invocation logs.
The public load balancer, because all Azure traffic uses it.
The DNS CNAME record for the checkout API.

questions.explanation: The symptom belongs to event processing, so trigger and invocation evidence should come first.

questions.scenario: The receipt sender failed for one customer order, and the team needs to follow the event through the function app without guessing from memory. Which evidence helps explain a failed function invocation?

options.text: The trigger that started the function.
The correlation ID or message ID for the event.
Runtime settings and secret references available to the function app.
The exact size of the developer laptop.

questions.explanation: A function incident is easier to diagnose when the event, invocation, and runtime inputs are visible.
